headline: Justice Department probes fertilizer giants for possible price collusion
summary: Investing.com -- The U.S. Justice Department has launched an antitrust investigation into whether leading commercial fertilizer producers colluded to raise prices, Bloomberg News reported, citing people familiar with the matter, sending shares of the industry's largest players down as much as 2.7% in Wednesday trading.
